title: Evaluate homepage with live preview graph rendering
description: Verifies the homepage loads with dark theme and the hero KnowledgeGraph preview renders from sample data without errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify dark theme styling is applied on initial load
Verify a knowledge graph preview is displayed in the hero area

title: Dark theme applies on homepage load
description: Verifies that the homepage renders with dark theme automatically on first load.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the page renders in dark theme

title: Dark theme applies on demo page entry
description: Verifies that the demo page renders with dark theme automatically when entered directly.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Verify the page renders in dark theme

title: Dark theme applies on docs getting started entry
description: Verifies that the Getting Started docs page renders with dark theme automatically when entered directly.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs/getting-started
Verify the page renders in dark theme

title: Switch between all demo graph layouts
description: Verifies switching among force, radial, arc, and chord layouts re-renders the graph layout each time.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Select the force layout
Select the radial layout
Select the arc layout
Select the chord layout
Verify the graph visualization updates to reflect the selected layout

title: Dark theme persists after navigating between routes
description: Verifies that dark theme remains applied when navigating from the homepage to demo and then to docs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the demo page
Click the link to open the documentation section
Verify the current page renders in dark theme

title: Select a node updates the Selected Node panel
description: Verifies clicking a node in the demo graph populates the Selected Node panel with that node’s details.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Click a node in the graph visualization
Verify the Selected Node panel is populated with node details

title: Enter docs from homepage via Get Started
description: Verifies the Get Started action from the homepage takes the user to the Getting Started documentation page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the Get Started action
Verify the Getting Started documentation page is displayed

title: Dark theme remains after a page reload on demo
description: Verifies that reloading the demo page keeps dark theme applied without reverting to a light theme.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Reload the page
Verify the page renders in dark theme

title: Export demo graph as PNG
description: Verifies exporting from the demo creates a downloadable PNG snapshot of the current graph state.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Select a non-default layout
Click a node group chip
Click the Export PNG action
Verify a PNG file download is initiated

title: Filter and highlight nodes by group chip
description: Verifies selecting a group chip filters or highlights the graph nodes by that group.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Click a node group chip
Verify the graph updates to show only or emphasize nodes from the selected group

title: Redirect /docs to Getting Started
description: Verifies navigating to the docs index route redirects the user to the Getting Started page.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs
Verify the Getting Started documentation page is displayed

title: Toggle tooltip fields changes tooltip content
description: Verifies enabling and disabling tooltip fields and metadata keys changes what is shown when viewing a tooltip.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo
Toggle at least one node tooltip field
Toggle at least one metadata key
Hover over a node to reveal its tooltip
Verify the tooltip content reflects the currently selected fields and keys

title: Browse Examples and copy an embedded snippet
description: Verifies the Examples page renders code blocks and a user can copy an embedded code snippet with visible feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs/examples
Scroll to a code example block
Click the copy control for the snippet
Verify a copy-to-clipboard confirmation is visible

title: Copy install command from homepage
description: Verifies a user can copy the install command from the homepage and receives visible copy feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the copy control for the install command
Verify a copy-to-clipboard confirmation is visible

title: Navigate from Getting Started to API Reference via sidebar
description: Verifies the sidebar navigation takes the user from Getting Started to the API Reference page.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs/getting-started
Click the sidebar navigation item for API Reference
Verify the API Reference page is displayed

title: Use API Reference table of contents jump to a section
description: Verifies clicking an in-page table of contents item scrolls to and reveals the corresponding API section.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs/api-reference
Click an item in the in-page table of contents
Verify the corresponding API section is brought into view

title: Experience homepage hero parallax motion
description: Verifies moving the pointer across the homepage hero visual produces observable parallax motion without breaking the preview.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Move the pointer across the hero visual area
Verify the hero visual responds with parallax-like motion
Verify the knowledge graph preview remains displayed

title: Open and read Changelog via sidebar navigation
description: Verifies the user can navigate to the Changelog page and see release notes content.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs/getting-started
Click the sidebar navigation item for Changelog
Verify release notes content is displayed

title: Open project repository link from homepage
description: Verifies the homepage repository link opens the project source destination without disrupting the current page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view the project repository
Verify a new browser tab opens to an external site
